---
title: "Space Hackathon"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Innovating for Space Exploration"
description: "Innovate for space exploration at the Space Hackathon on October 3-4, 2026 in Craiova, Romania with teams solving real space challenges."
date: "2026-10-03"
enddate: "2026-10-04"
location: "Craiova, Romania"
category: "hackathon"
image: "/assets/images/space-hackathon.jpg"
registration_date: "2026-07-01"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Hackathon</div>
    <h1>Space Hackathon</h1>
    <p>Innovating for Space Exploration</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>October 3-4, 2026</span>
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Craiova, Romania</span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
      <a href="https://www.spaceappschallenge.org/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;" target="_blank">Register Now (RSVP)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">48h</div><div class="m-nl">Duration</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">Global</div><div class="m-nl">Hackathon</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">3</div><div class="m-nl">BootCamps</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">9+</div><div class="m-nl">Partners</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Event Overview</h2>
    <p>Join the largest annual global hackathon on October 3-4, 2026.</p>
    <p>Space Apps is a 48 hours global hackathon, engaging thousands of problem solvers each year across the globe. The event embraces collaborative problem solving with a goal of producing relevant open-source solutions to address global needs applicable to both life on Earth and life in space.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Pre-hackathon BootCamps</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>July 2026</h4><div class="up-meta">Location & hours to be announced</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>August 2026</h4><div class="up-meta">Location & hours to be announced</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>September 2026</h4><div class="up-meta">Location & hours to be announced</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><em>The pre-hackathon bootcamps will be held at our official Outpost locations.</em></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Schedule</h2>
    <h3>Hackathon Day 1 (October 3)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto 2rem;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Hacker Orientation</h4><div class="up-meta">Check in, grab dinner, set up required software accounts, learn about the challenges, hear from sponsors and mentors, form teams, and get ready for a weekend of hacking.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Morning (09:00)</h4><div class="up-meta">Return to the hackathon space for breakfast and hackathon kickoff, then get hacking! Lunch and dinner will also be served.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>All Day</h4><div class="up-meta">Organizers and volunteers on hand. Technology and science mentors available in person and virtually to float between teams.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <h3>Hackathon Day 2 (October 4)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Morning</h4><div class="up-meta">Breakfast and wrap up projects. Project submission at noon, followed by lunch.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Afternoon</h4><div class="up-meta">Team demos (globally live-streamed, open for friends and family). Sponsor awards and judges announce the hackathon winners.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><strong>Note:</strong> Participants under the age of 18 require adult supervision for the entirety of the hackathon.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Organizers & Sponsors</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Organized by</h4><div class="up-meta">Chenist Academy</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-star" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Main Sponsor</h4><div class="up-meta">Chenist Cybersecurity</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;">Contact us for sponsorships at <a href="/booking/">chen.ist/booking</a> or 0740303764.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Partners</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Scoala Romano-Britanica</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Chenist Digital</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Cluster EduTIC</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">University of Craiova</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">ARTI</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Roofs.Center</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Clubul.Computer</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Society for Computing Technologies</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Internet Oltenia</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;">Are you a representative of a company and want to be part of this journey? Contact us for partnerships at <a href="/booking/">chen.ist/booking</a> or 0740303764.</p>
    <p><em>More will be announced soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Meet the Trainers</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Alin Mechenici</h3><p>Founder PR Patrat & Chenist Cybersecurity</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Alin Burileanu</h3><p>Founder Prokinetic & Staff Medical @ Romanian Football Team</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="/booking/">Apply as a trainer here.</a></p>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Meet the Judges</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Mihai Gabroveanu</h3><p>Professor @ Craiova University, Department of Applied Mathematics (DAM)</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Mirel Cosulschi</h3><p>Professor @ Craiova University, Department of Applied Mathematics (DAM)</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="/booking/">Apply as a judge here.</a></p>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Meet the Mentors</h2>
    <p>Coming soon. <a href="/booking/">Apply as a mentor here.</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Educational Partners</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">University of Craiova</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Romanian British School</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Media Partners</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Gazeta De Sud</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Radio Sud</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Kiss FM</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">TVR Craiova</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Official Outposts</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Barcicleta</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Snap Cafe 2A</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><em>Listed in alphabetical order</em></p>
    <p>Thank you for promoting our event, don't forget to ping us with the link.</p>
    <p>Check our latest editions here: <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/archive.html">2016-2024 Archive</a>.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Related Events -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Related Events</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3><p>Developing responsible AI systems</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon</h3><p>48-hour challenge for security enthusiasts</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Join the Next Generation of Space Innovators</h2>
    <p>Be part of a weekend that could launch groundbreaking ideas for space exploration and technology.</p>
    <p><strong>Note:</strong> This event runs under the <a href="https://berlincodeofconduct.org/" target="_blank" style="color:#fff !important;">Berlin Code of Conduct</a></p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://www.spaceappschallenge.org/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;" target="_blank">Register Now (RSVP)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:3rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px; text-align:center;">
    <h2>Stay Updated</h2>
    <p>For updates, follow and subscribe to our newsletter: <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank">Subscribe</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
